# delegate

**Instance Property**

Specifies the delegate object.

## Declaration

```swift
@IBOutlet @MainActor unowned(unsafe) var delegate: (any IKDeviceBrowserViewDelegate)! { get set }
```

## Discussion

The delegate object must conform to the [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKDeviceBrowserViewDelegate] protocol.
